certifications.summary: Candidate is pursuing CCNP Enterprise, which is a highly preferred certification, but it is not yet obtained.

education.summary: Candidate holds a Bachelor of Engineering degree, which aligns with the required related technical field.

experience.summary: Candidate has nearly 4 years of experience, which is close but slightly less than the required 5+ years for an L3 Engineer.

location.summary: Candidate is located in Bengaluru, which is one of the preferred job locations.

project_history_relevance.summary: Candidate demonstrates strong experience in troubleshooting and maintaining complex network security and routing/switching environments, but less explicit experience in designing large-scale, multi-vendor data center architectures.

skillset.summary: Strong match in firewall operations (Cisco ASA, FTD, FMC) and core routing/switching protocols (BGP, OSPF, EIGRP, MPLS), but lacks explicit experience with specific load balancers, some advanced data center technologies (e.g., VXLAN, EVPN), and certain monitoring tools.

tools_used.summary: Candidate has strong experience with Cisco security tools (ASA, FTD, FMC) and Wireshark, but lacks experience with other specified monitoring tools, load balancers, and multi-vendor data center platforms (e.g., Palo Alto, Fortinet, F5, Cisco Nexus, Juniper).

function_2_resume_data_extraction.professional_summary: Technical Consulting Engineer with nearly 4 years of experience at Cisco Systems, specializing in enterprise network security and firewall operations. Hands-on expertise in Cisco ASA and Firepower (FTD/FMC), ACLs, NAT, VPNs, and secure access controls, with solid knowledge of routing and switching. Proven ability to resolve SEV1/SEV2 incidents under strict SLAs while maintaining 99.9% network uptime in 24/7 environments.
skills_inventory: Firewall Operations (ASA, FTD, FMC) & Policy Management
